reviews.comment:
Atención excelente tanto en la playa como en el servicompras... siempre nos atienden muy bien!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both on the beach and at the convenience store... they always treat us very well!!

reviews.comment:
Muy completo, tiene para controlar e inflar neumáticos pero aveces se llena y no tenes dónde esperar. Lo demás genial

(Translated by Google)
Very complete, it has a tire monitor and inflator, but sometimes it fills up and you have nowhere to wait. Everything else is great.

reviews.comment:
Los baños sucios (muy sucios, heces por el piso), la full para comprar comestibles estaba cerrada y la maquina de agua caliente solo aceptaba monedas, mala atención de los playeros e incluso cuando preguntamos para comprar fichas para el agua caliente se rieron, señalaron la maquina y dijeron "¿no ves que solo monedas?"

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were dirty (very dirty, feces on the floor), the convenience store was closed, and the hot water machine only accepted coins. The beach attendants were inconvenient, and even when we asked to buy tokens for the hot water, they laughed, pointed at the machine, and said, "Can't you see it only accepts coins?"
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtLVBqSGh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención al público. Solo recuerden que por la noche solo reciben débito ,NO EFECTIVO. me parece bien para cuidar al personal.

(Translated by Google)
Good customer service. Just remember that at night they only accept debit cards, NOT CASH. I think this is a good way to protect the staff.
